title: Internship Experience - Factual Source
content:
Infosys internship (2019):
- Software Engineering Intern in a structured training and project environment.
- Built full-stack features including authentication, browsing, rating, and analytics components in a movie database application context.
- Early analytics and aggregation work helped shape a transition toward data science and ML-oriented problem solving.
- Developed software engineering habits through code reviews, debugging incidents, and collaborative development practices.

R/SEEK internship at UMBC (2025):
- AI/ML programming internship focused on robotics and embedded edge AI.
- Built real-time computer vision functionality under constrained hardware settings.
- Worked at the intersection of ML models, embedded systems, and educational robotics use cases.
- Gained practical experience with latency, safety, and interpretability considerations outside pure cloud-based ML workflows.

Career relevance of internship phases:
- Infosys phase established software engineering and data-curiosity foundations.
- R/SEEK phase expanded capabilities into edge AI and real-time applied ML.
- Together they bookend the transition from engineering fundamentals to production and applied AI specialization.
